      public int numRows
      The number of rows (n) in the country map grid.

      The number of columns (m) in the country map grid.

  • Constructor Details

    • TransportDataGenerator

      public TransportDataGenerator(int numRows, int numCols)
      3) Konstruktor za TransportDataGenerator.
      Parameters:
      numRows - Broj redova matrice gradova (n).
      numCols - Broj kolona matrice gradova (m).

  • Method Details

    • generateData

      public TransportData generateData()
      Generates a complete set of transportation data, including the country map, stations within each city, and various departures from these stations.
      Returns:
      A TransportData object containing the generated map, stations, and departures.

    • generateCountryMap

      public String[][] generateCountryMap()
      Generates a 2D array representing the country map. Each element in the array is a string in the format "G_X_Y", where X and Y are the coordinates of the city within the grid. The dimensions of the map are determined by numRows and numCols.
      Returns:
      A String[][] representing the grid-based country map.

    • generateStations

      public List<Station> generateStations()
      Generates a list of Station objects, one for each city in the country map. Each station includes the city name, a bus station name (e.g., "A_X_Y"), and a train station name (e.g., "Z_X_Y").
      Returns:
      A List of Station objects.

    • generateDepartures

      public List<Departure> generateDepartures(List<Station> stations)
      Generates a list of Departure objects based on the provided list of stations. For each station, it generates a fixed number of bus and train departures to neighboring cities.
      Parameters:
      stations - A List of Station objects from which departures will be generated.
      Returns:
      A List of Departure objects.

    • generateDeparture

      public Departure generateDeparture(String type, String from, int x, int y)
      Generates a single Departure object with random characteristics. The destination of the departure is a randomly chosen neighboring city. Other attributes like departure time, duration, price, and minimum transfer time are also randomized.
      Parameters:
      type - The type of transport (e.g., "autobus" or "voz").
      from - The name of the departure station.
      x - The X coordinate of the city where the departure originates.
      y - The Y coordinate of the city where the departure originates.
      Returns:
      A Departure object with generated details.

    • getNeighbors

      public List<String> getNeighbors(int x, int y)
      Retrieves a list of direct neighboring cities for a given city at coordinates (x, y). Neighbors are considered to be cities immediately to the left, right, top, or bottom within the grid, respecting the map boundaries defined by numRows and numCols.
      Parameters:
      x - The X coordinate of the current city.
      y - The Y coordinate of the current city.
      Returns:
      A List of strings, where each string is the name of a neighboring city (e.g., "G_X_Y").

    • saveToJson

      public void saveToJson(TransportData data, String filename)
      Saves the generated transport data (country map, stations, and departures) into a JSON file. The data is formatted as a JSON object with three main arrays: "countryMap", "stations", and "departures".
      Parameters:
      data - The TransportData object containing all the data to be saved.
      filename - The name of the file (including path, if necessary) where the JSON data will be written.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during file writing.
